name: Suspicious Double File Extension Process
notes:
This is rule detects processes with double file extensions.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), @blu3_team (idea), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Double Extension File Execution
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious use of an .exe extension after a non-executable file extension like .pdf.exe, a set of spaces or underlines to cloak the executable file in spear phishing campaigns


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.doc.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.docx.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.xls.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.xlsx.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.ppt.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.pptx.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.rtf.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.pdf.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.txt.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '% .exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%______.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.doc.js' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.docx.js' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.xls.js' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.xlsx.js' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.ppt.js' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.pptx.js' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.rtf.js' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.pdf.js' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.txt.js' AQL filter query

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.doc.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.docx.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.xls.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.xlsx.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ppt.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.pptx.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.rtf.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.pdf.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.txt.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% .exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%______.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.doc.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.docx.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.xls.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.xlsx.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ppt.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.pptx.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.rtf.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.pdf.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.txt.js%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Double File Extension Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.doc.exe' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.docx.exe' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.xls.exe' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.xlsx.exe' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.ppt.exe' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.pptx.exe' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.rtf.exe' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.pdf.exe' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.txt.exe' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%      .exe' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%______.exe' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.doc.js' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.docx.js' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.xls.js' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.xlsx.js' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.ppt.js' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.pptx.js' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.rtf.js' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.pdf.js' OR  LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%.txt.js' AQL filter query

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.doc.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.docx.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.xls.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.xlsx.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ppt.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.pptx.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.rtf.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.pdf.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.txt.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%      .exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%______.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.doc.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.docx.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.xls.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.xlsx.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ppt.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.pptx.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.rtf.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.pdf.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.txt.js%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Double File Extension Process
Event description: Detects processes with double file extensions.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
